hero.desc: BetaCare yana sanya tarihin likitancin ku a kan intanet don haka yana bin ku a duk inda kula da lafiya ya kai ku — a fadin asibitoci, fadin birane, fadin Najeriya. Babu sauran bayanan da suka ɓace. Babu sauran farawa daga farko.
marquee: An ƃoye daga farko har karshe
Saka idanu kan lafiya na AI

problem.desc: Asibitoci irin su UCH suna ci gaba da dogaro da takarda don bin tarihin marasa lafiya. Sakamakon zai iya zama mai haɗari ga rayuwa.

problems.title: Takardun asibiti suna ɓacewa
problems.description: Dubban mutane suna zuwa asibiti kawai don gano takardun su sun ɓace — yana sa su fara duba daga farko.

problems.title: Lalacewar jiki ba ta dawowa
problems.description: Wuta, ambaliya, da amfani na yau da kullun suna lalata tarihin lafiya. Bà ajiya, bà dawowa.

problems.title: Bà ci gaba tsakanin asibitoci
problems.description: Daban-daban asibitoci ba su da masaniyar jinyar da aka yi a baya — yana haifar da gwaje-gwaje biyu da matsala masu haɗari.

features.title: Duk abin da kuke bukata, a kan dandamali ɗaya
features.desc: An gina musamman don tsarin kiwon lafiya na Najeriya — mai aminci, mai tsaro, kuma mai saukin amfani.

list.label: Siffa ta Musamman
list.title: Rubutun Lafiya na Dijital
list.desc: Wani rumbun adana bayanai da ke adana cikakken tarihin lafiyarku - gwaje-gwaje, takardun magani, da rubutun likita.
points: Ma’ajiyar da aka ɓoye daga farko zuwa ƙarshe
Ya dace da dokokin tsare sirri na Najeriya

list.label: Siffa ta Musamman
list.title: Abin dubawa na Najeriya
list.desc: BetaCare yana aiki kan WhatsApp da SMS. Babu buƙatar sauke manhaja. Adadin kayan aikin da suke amfani da su.
points: SMS ga yankunan da babu intanet sosai

list.label: Ayyukan AI
list.title: Jami’in Lafiya Mai Lura
list.desc: AI ɗinmu yana kera bayanan lafiya ga kowane mai amfani - lura da shan magani, tunatarwa akan likita, da gano hadarin lafiya da wuri.

howItWorks.title: Sauki ga kowa da kowa
howItWorks.desc: Majiyyaci, likita, ko asibiti — farawa baya wuce mintuna biyu.

steps.title: Irkiri asusunka
steps.desc: Yi rajista da suna, lambar waya, da imel acikin kankanin lokaci.

steps.title: Tsara bayanan lafiyarku
steps.desc: Amsa tambayoyi kadan sannan ka shigo da tsoffin bayananka ta WhatsApp.

steps.title: Shiga bayananka a kowane wuri
steps.desc: Duba tarihinka, raba tare da kowane likita a asirce, sami tunatarwar lafiya.

steps.title: Yi rajista & shigar da bayanai
steps.desc: Yi rajista da cikakken suna, imel, da lambar lasisin MDCN.

steps.title: Tabbatar da wanene kai
steps.desc: Imel OTP, sannan duba fuskarka don cikakken tabbaci.

steps.title: Duba tarihin majiyyaci
steps.desc: Tare da izini, duba rikodi, sabunta rubutu, bi sawun ci gaban majiyyaci.

steps.title: Aika don haɗawa
steps.desc: Saka takardun asibitin ku da rajistar CAC domin bincike.

steps.title: Kafa dandamalin ku
steps.desc: Tsara tafiyar majiyyata, sassa, da asusun likitoci.

steps.title: Fara aiki
steps.desc: Fara kula da ziyara, sarrafa bayanai a kan na’ura, da aiki tare.

trust.title: An gina shi bisa aminci
trust.desc: Tsaro da sirri suna da mahimmanci a gare mu.

pillars.title: An boye bayanai sosai
pillars.desc: Bayanan lafiyar ku suna cikin asiri. Babu wanda zai iya karanta shi ba tare da izinin ku ba.

pillars.title: Ya dace da NDPR
pillars.desc: Cikakken aiki tare da Dokar Kare Bayanai ta Najeriya da matsayin bayanan lafiya na duniya.

pillars.title: Izinin Majiyyaci ne a Gaba
pillars.desc: Ku ke tsara wanda zai ga bayananku. Kowane neman shiga yana da rubutu don ku duba.

pillars.title: Akwai a Koda Yaushe
pillars.desc: Bayananku suna nan koda akwai yankewar wutar lantarki ta WhatsApp da SMS.

hospital.title: Haɗa BetaCare zuwa asibitinku a yau
hospital.desc: Baiwa ma’aikatan asibitinku dama nan take ga cikakken tarihin majiyyata. Rage aikin takarda, inganta kula.
benefits: Samun damar shiga bayanan majiyyata a wurin kula
Rage lokacin tuntuba da gwaji sau biyu
Sabuntawa na ainihin lokaci ga kowane sashe
Ya dace da ka’idojin bayanan lafiya na Najeriya

faq.title: Tambayoyin da ake yi akai-akai
faq.desc: Duk abin da kuke buƙatar sani game da BetaCare. Ba ku sami amsar ku ba?

items.a: E, BetaCare kyauta ne gaba daya ga marasa lafiya — koyaushe. Muna cajin asibitoci kudin amfani kawai. Marasa lafiya ba zasu taɓa biya ba.

items.q: Ta yaya zan ga bayanan lafiyata?
items.a: Zaku iya samun bayanan ku ta hanyar intanet, WhatsApp, ko SMS. Babu buƙatar manhaja. Yi rijista sau ɗaya kuma bayanan ku suna tare daku a ko’ina.
Kwarai kuwa. Duk bayanan an kare su sannan an adana su a wuraren da suka dace da NDPR. Ba zamu taba siyar da bayanan ku ba.
Muna aiki da asibitoci daban-daban a Legas, Abuja, da Fatakwal. Kowane asibiti zai iya nema — cibiyar mu tana fadada koyaushe.

items.q: Ta yaya ake tabbatar da likita?
items.a: Likitoci suna bin tsari na matakai uku: OTP na Imel, tabbatar da lambar MDCN, da tabbatar da fuska. Kwararrun likitoci kawai suke samun shiga.

items.q: Zan iya amfani da BetaCare ba tare da wayar zamani ba?
items.a: E. BetaCare yana aiki da SMS ga masu amfani da ba su da wayar zamani ko intanet. Kowace waya mai katin SIM zatayi aiki.

items.q: Me zai faru da bayanai na idan na canza asibiti?
items.a: Bayananku naku ne, ba na asibitin ba. Idan kuka ziyarci sabon asibiti, kuna basu izinin ganin bayanan ku — tarihinku zai kasance nan take.

items.q: Ta yaya Jami’in Lafiya na AI ke aiki?
items.a: AI yana lura da lafiyar ku daga bayanan ku. Yana aiko da tunatarwa, gano matsaloli, sannan ya amsa tambayoyi masu sauƙi ta WhatsApp.

cta.title: Tarihin lafiyarku ya cancanci a adana shi
cta.desc: Haɗa da ƴan Najeriya waɗanda suka ɗauki ikon kula da bayanan lafiyarsu. Yi rajista kyauta — babu katin banki, babu sauke manhaja.

footer.desc: Tsara bayanan lafiyar Najeriya akan intanet, kowane majiyyaci a lokaci guda.
